title: Gym Membership Cancellation
text:
## Gym Membership Cancellation

I would like to cancel my {adjective} gym membership immediately.

When I joined, the brochure promised {number} machines, fresh {food}, and a trainer who would {verb} politely.

Instead, I found a {animal} on the treadmill and {person} {verb ending in -ing} in the sauna.

My final class involved lifting a {color} {object} with my {body part}.

Please stop billing my {noun}, return my {clothing item}, and remove me from the {emotion} newsletter before {day of week}. My {body part} still feels {adjective} from {number} {plural noun}.
